name: Yellow and Red Bell Peppers Filled with Tuna
recipeIngredient: 10 Yellow bell peppers, cut lengthwise into thirds
10 Red bell peppers, cut lengthwise into thirds
3 Cans Albacore tuna packed in water -- drained
Imported black olives (such as Kalamata or Nicoise)
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange the pepper skin side up in a broiler pan (in batches if necessary) and broil until blackened.
2. Wrap the peppers in paper bags and let stand 10 minutes to steam.
3. Peel and pat dry the peppers.
4. Mix olive oil, lemon juice, and garlic in a large bowl. Season with salt and pepper.
5. Add the peppers and marinate for at least 30 minutes. (Can be prepared ahead of time. Cover and refrigerate. Bring to room temperature before continuing.)
6. Drain the peppers, reserving the marinade.
7. Combine tuna, chopped parsley, and capers in another bowl, breaking up the tuna with a fork.
8. Mix in enough reserved marinade to season to taste. Season with salt and pepper.
9. Place 1 tablespoon of tuna mixture on the inside of each piece of pepper at one end.
10. Roll up the peppers. Arrange seam side down on a serving platter.
11. Pour remaining marinade over rolls. (Can be prepared ahead of time. Cover and refrigerate.)
12. Garnish with parsley sprigs and olives before serving.
